title: Better Food+
description: A vanilla-friendly fabric mod that adds a bit of comfort to Minecraft.
body:
### Summary

Better Food is a fabric 1.21.8 mod that adds a lot of, well you guessed it, FOOD! This ranges from herbal tea, all the way to mushroom pie!



### License

You are NOT allowed to copy, or upload MY mod under another name without credits.

Minecraft versions 1.21.8 are supported.



### Installation
1. Download and install Minecraft.
   
2. Download Fabric Installer
  
3. Make sure to download Fabric API aswell.

4. Once Fabric is installed, press the "Files" button above on the CurseForge page.

5. Download your desired Minecraft version, and open the Minecraft folder. (.minecraft)

6. Drag the .jar file and the Fabric API jar into "mods".

7. Load your desired Minecraft version, create a new world and you're finished!



### Features

Healthy Carrot - Stacks up to 16 and gives the player the regeneration effect for 5 seconds.

Glazed Beetroot - Stacks up to 64 and removes the hunger effect from the player when eaten. (If the player has the effect)

Toasted Bread - Stacks up to 64 and has more nutrition and saturation than bread.

Spiced Apple - Stacks up to 16 and gives the player the fire resistance effect for 10 seconds.

Ender Stew - Stacks up to 1 and is a sustainable way to get a lot of hunger bars in the end.

Mushroom Pie - Stacks up to 1 and has more nutrition and saturation than pumpkin pie.

Dehydrated Cactus - Stacks up to 6 (so you don't get poked!) and gives a sustainable food source in the desert.

Frozen Melon - Stacks up to 64 and gives the player the frozen effect for 3 seconds. Has more saturation than a normal melon slice.

Golden Potato - Stacks up to 64 and gives the player the fire resistance and regeneration effect for 6 seconds.

Berry Tart - Stacks up to 1 and gives 2 hunger bars.

Herbal Tea - Stacks up to 1 and clears ALL effects that the player has.

Pumpkin Yogurt - Stacks up to 1 and gives 4 hunger bars.

Rice - Stacks up to 64 and gives half a hunger bar.

Sushi - Stacks up to 16 and gives 2 and a half hunger bars.

Omelette - Stacks up to 64 and gives 2 hunger bars.

Spiced Nether Stew - Stacks up to 1 and gives 3 hunger bars.

Rice Stalk - Generates naturally in forest and savvana biomes, adding a way to get rice.

**This my first mod by the way, so please download it :)**
